{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Blackflame ancestors
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Blackflame ancestors]] placed three [[Trials]] at this location for the three basic techniques of the [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
